response.justification: Over a decade of full-stack experience with directly relevant TypeScript/Node.js work at Optilyz and re:cinq, including current hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling that aligns precisely with the role's AI agent requirement. Strong craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, pairing) and React/MongoDB/AWS exposure cover the primary stack, with only Nest.js and Kotlin/Java depth as open questions.
strengths: Current AI-agent and MCP infrastructure experience matches a key requirement
Long full-stack track record with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and AWS
Demonstrated craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and community teaching
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest mention in the resume
Kotlin experience not evidenced; Java exposure is older and narrow
Significant time invested in DLang, which is tangential to the target stack

key_factors.factor: Relevant AI-agent and full-stack TS/Node experience
